response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings over 30 years of broad engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative, including recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role demands director-level AI strategy leadership — advising strategic customers, shaping cloud product futures, and demonstrating recognized AI expertise — areas where the resume provides limited evidence. The AI involvement appears hands-on and infrastructure-scoped rather than strategic, there is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and public thought leadership is confined to GIS and software testing topics rather than AI or cloud strategy.
strengths: 30+ year engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, well exceeding the 15-year minimum requirement
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform) and recent hands-on contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Active knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks demonstrates communication and teaching skills relevant to the advisory and evangelism responsibilities
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; holds two bachelor's degrees (Computer Science and Fine Arts), missing the strongly preferred advanced degree
AI involvement appears limited to infrastructure tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflow support) with no demonstrated strategic AI product leadership or externally recognized AI expertise
No evident experience in the director-level IC responsibilities of advising strategic enterprise customers on AI/cloud adoption or influencing cloud product roadmaps at organizational scale
